name: Tartaglia
desc: "Asilzade" olarak da bilinen 11 numaralı Haberci. Savaş alanındaki cesaretiyle nam salmıştır.

list.key: Dehanın Yakarışı Kart Oyunu Karakter Kartı

list.imgDesc:
Orijinal Kıyafet - Şanlı Kılıçlar

Tartaglia'nın giysisi. Asilzade'nin on birinci Fatui Habercisi unvanını simgeleyen göz alıcı bir kıyafet.

list.desc:
Normal Saldırı
Arka arkaya en fazla 6 ok atar.

Yüklü Saldırı
Daha isabetli ve daha yüksek Hasar veren bir Hedefli Atış yapar.
Nişan alırken okun ucunda Suyun gücü birikir. Tam yüklü bu sel oku Su Hasarı verir ve Dalga durum etkisi uygular.

Dalga
Tartaglia'nın Dalgadan etkilenen düşmanlara yaptığı çeşitli saldırılar, düşmanlara Su Alan Hasarı verir. Bu şekilde verilen Hasar, Normal Saldırı Hasarı olarak geçer.
· Dalga Parıltısı: Dalgadan etkilenen bir düşmanı vuran ve arka arkaya Alan Hasarı veren tam yüklü bir Hedefli Atış. 0,7 saniyede bir uygulanabilir.
· Dalga Patlaması: Dalgadan etkilenen bir düşman yenildiğinde yakındaki düşmanlara vurunca Dalga etkisi veren bir Su patlaması ortaya çıkar.

Havadan Saldırı
Havadayken yaylım ok atışı yapar ve dalışa geçerek yere vurur. Yere vurduğunda Alan Hasarı verir.
Tartaglia, Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi Yakın Saldırı duruşundayken havadan saldırı yapamaz.
list.title: Normal Saldırı: Keskin Sel

list.desc:
Saf sudan üretilmiş silahlar çıkararak etrafındaki düşmanlara Su Hasarı verir ve Yakın Saldırı duruşuna geçer.

Bu duruştayken Tartaglia'nın Normal ve Yüklü Saldırıları diğer herhangi bir element tesiriyle değişmeyecek şekilde Su Hasarına dönüşür ve şu şekilde değişir:

Normal Saldırı
Arka arkaya en fazla 6 Su saldırısı yapar.

Yüklü Saldırı
Belirli miktarda Dayanıklılık harcayarak çapraz saldırı yapar ve Su Hasarı verir.

Dalga Darbesi
Dalgadan etkilenen bir düşmana yakından saldırdığında Su Alan Hasarı veren Dalga Darbesi açığa çıkar. Bu şekilde verilen Hasar, Element Becerisi Hasarı sayılır ve 1,5 saniyede bir uygulanabilir.

30 sn sonra veya yetenek tekrar kullanıldığında bu beceri sona erer. Tartaglia, Menzilli Saldırı Duruşuna geri döner ve bu Becerinin Bekleme Süresi Başlar. Tartaglia, Yakın Saldırı duruşunda ne kadar uzun kalırsa Bekleme Süresi de o kadar uzun olur.
30 sn sonunda menzilli saldırı duruşuna otomatik olarak dönülürse Bekleme Süresi daha da uzun olur.

Yay kullanmasının amacı yay kullanmaktaki zayıflığını yenmekti ama savaş ciddiyse onun da ciddileşmesi gerekir...
list.title: Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi

list.desc:
Kullanıldığında Tartaglia'nın duruşuna bağlı olarak farklı saldırılar yapar.

Menzilli Saldırı Duruşu: Yıkım Atışı
Su etkisine sahip büyülü bir oku hızla atar ve Su Alan Hasarı vererek Dalga durumu uygular.

Kullanıldıktan sonra Enerji Maliyetinin bir kısmı geri verilir.

Yakın Saldırı Duruşu: Yok Eden Işık
Geniş bir etki alanı olan bir darbe indirir ve etraftaki tüm düşmanlara vurarak çok büyük miktarda Su Hasarı verir. Böylece Dalga Saldırısı tetiklenir.

Dalga Saldırısı
Yok edici sular, Dalgadan etkilenen bir düşmana vurduğunda Dalga durumu düşmanlardan kalkar ve Su Alan Hasarı veren bir Su Patlaması tetiklenir.

Bu şekilde verilen Hasar, Element Patlaması Hasarı olarak geçer.

Karlı vatanında akarsular nadir görülür. Belki suya hükmetme becerisi suyun ne kadar kıymetli olduğunu bilmesinden geliyordur.
list.title: Yıkım: Yok Etme

list.desc: Dalga süresini 8 saniye uzatır.
list.title: Ebediyet

list.desc: Tartaglia Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi Yakın Saldırı duruşundayken Kritik Vuruş yaptığında Normal ve Yüklü Saldırılar düşmanlara Dalga etkisi uygular.
list.title: Akıntı Kılıcı

list.desc: Kendi grup üyelerinin Normal Saldırı Seviyesini 1 artırır.
list.title: Silah Ustası

list.desc: Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi becerisinin Bekleme Süresini %20 kısaltır.
list.name: Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalga Tutan

list.desc: Tartaglia, Dalga etkisindeki düşmanlar yenildiğinde 4 Element Enerjisi yeniler.
list.name: Kötülüğün Mirası: Gizli Akıntı

list.desc:
Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi Seviyesini 3 artırır.

Maksimum Yükseltme Seviyesi 15'tir.
list.name: Hiçlik Felaketi: Kargaşa Girdabı

list.desc:
Tartaglia, Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi Yakın Saldırı duruşundayken Dalga etkisindeki düşmanlara karşı 4 saniyede bir Dalga Darbesi tetikler. Menzilli Saldırı Duruşundayken ise Dalga Parıltısı tetikler.
Bu Takımyıldız etkisiyle tetiklenen Dalga Darbesi ve Dalga Parıltısı için normalde var olan zaman aralıkları geçerli değildir. Ayrıca bu iki becerinin söz konusu zaman aralıkları üzerinde etkisi yoktur.
list.name: Hiçlik Felaketi: Su Patlaması

list.desc:
Yıkım: Yok Etme Seviyesini 3 artırır.

Maksimum Yükseltme Seviyesi 15'tir.
list.name: Yıkım: Akışkan Kılıç

list.desc:
Yıkım: Yok Etme, Yakın Saldırı Duruşunda kullanıldığında Kötülüğün Mirası: Dalgaların Öfkesi becerisinin Bekleme Süresi sıfırlanır.

Bu etki ancak Tartaglia Menzilli Saldırı Duruşuna döndüğünde devreye girer.
list.name: Yıkım: İmha

list.desc:
Despite holding one of the most senior positions in the Fatui as one of the Eleven Harbingers, Childe very much looks like the young adult that he still is.
He is a wolf in sheep's clothing, however, for under the cheerful and confident appearance lies a deadly swordsman.
He is the youngest among the Harbingers, but one of the most dangerous among their number.
That said, Childe doesn't seem to fit in well with the others.
As a fighter first and foremost, he is quite at odds with this organization of deceit and treachery.
list.title: Character Details

list.desc:
As the youngest Harbinger in the history of the Fatui, Childe is hardly bound by convention, and plays by his own rules accordingly.
Though this lone wolf is not so well-received by his peers and is also at odds with their methods, his cavalier demeanor hides a responsible, watertight meticulousness.
He is a proud man of his word. Even if the promise he makes is absurd, he will never break it.
Be it exterminating all the dragons inside their lairs, venturing into a domain of extreme danger, or single-handedly overthrowing the territory of a nobleman...
He not only keeps his promises, but does so with finesse and surgical precision. As the Harbingers' vanguard, Childe always appears in the vulnerable underbellies of Snezhnaya's enemy states, striking as a conflict is about to erupt.
list.title: Character Story 1

list.desc:
Many myths in Snezhnaya say that Tartaglia has been on the battlefield since he was 14 years old.
Oddly enough, at that young age he already seemed to be a skilled slaughterer with mastery of many forms of martial arts.
But more terrifying than his skill in combat was his passion for it.
Perilous battles would only excite him, and terrifying foes would exhilarate him all the more.
Childe's arrogance and conceit are derived from honing himself across countless battles, and from unmatched combat experience.
On the other hand, because they fret about the way his quarrelsome personality tends to invite unwanted trouble, the other Harbingers constantly try to get him sent on missions to places as far from Snezhnaya as possible, so that they can avoid the fallout.
The man is incomprehensibly ever in the eye of the storm, and these unusual experiences have also made him quite the show-off who revels in the praise of others.
Unlike other members of the Harbingers, who prefer to keep a low profile, Tartaglia will often go to watch public performances — occasionally even becoming part of the show himself.
list.title: Character Story 2

list.desc:
Ice fishing has been one of Tartaglia's hobbies since childhood.
In those days, he was known neither by the names Tartaglia nor "Childe," as the Fatui call him, but as Ajax, named by his father after some hero's tale. He and his father would cut holes open upon frozen lakes before sitting beside them and tending to their fishing lines.
This was no easy task, and would sometimes take the entire morning.
But whether it was chiseling away at the thick ice or the long waits in between catches, he was always accompanied by his father's unending tales of adventure.
These were stories of his father's adventures from when he was young, and they became the future that Tartaglia secretly envisioned for himself.
So he would pay close attention, putting himself into the shoes of the protagonist of those tales, immersing himself fully in them even as they waited for a fish to bite.
Even after leaving home, Ajax, later to be known as "Childe" Tartaglia, would keep up that hobby of his.
No longer accompanied by the stories of bygone days, fishing instead became an opportunity to train — to hone his endurance, and reflect on combat techniques.
Such long periods of meditation to refine his skills swiftly relegated the question of a successful catch to irrelevance.
list.title: Character Story 3

list.desc:
Unlike what the rest of the world may think, Tartaglia was not born with his exceptional skills in battle.
But he would never speak to anyone about that critical, fateful encounter of his...
When he was 14, he fled his monotonous life at home with nothing but a shortsword and a bag of bread in hand.
That 14-year-old boy got lost in the snowy forest.
Pursued by bears and wolf packs, he lost his footing and fell into a bottomless crack in the earth's surface.
There, he witnessed the endless possibilities of another ancient world. There, he would meet a mysterious swordswoman...
Or perhaps one should say that this dark realm had sensed the burning ambition in this boy's heart.
This darkness was something that the Harbinger Childe could never again delve into.
In those three months, the swordswoman taught Tartaglia how to pass through the Abyss unhindered, and more importantly, nurtured the ability to stir up endless havoc from within Ajax's trouble-mongering nature.
No one knew what happened within that darkness during those three months, nor would Ajax ever speak of this to anyone.
When his worried mother and sisters finally found him in that forest, only 3 days had passed in this world.
Thus did Ajax's first adventure end, with his now-rusty shortsword in hand.
This would mark the end of his youth and the beginning of his days as a warrior.
list.title: Character Story 4

list.desc:
By the time he returned home, the young man was no longer the same.
He was no longer frightened and hesitant but had become frivolous and confident. He acted as if this world revolved around him, and as if battle existed for his sake.
Conflict often brings about change, and this capricious, incalculable change attracted Ajax like a revolving kaleidoscope.
In the eyes of his father, that third son that he had so worried about had changed for the worse, bringing much uncalled-for havoc to the seaside village of Morepesok.
Or perhaps it would be more accurate to say that Ajax had become a nexus of strife, for no matter where he went, fights and squabbles would follow — and he reveled in it.
Ultimately, after a huge brawl was pacified with some difficulty and with some near-fatal misses, his father had no choice but to hand his beloved son over for conscription into the Fatui.
He hoped that the strict military training of the Fatui could hone his son's temper, but wound up watching fully-armed troops getting the stuffing beaten out of them by a mere child.
This was a great disappointment to his father, but it also caught the attention of Pulcinella, the 5th Harbinger.
Shocked by Ajax's great strength and curious about how he invariably became the eye of a vortex of discord, Pulcinella inducted Ajax into the Fatui under the pretext of meting out punishment, ordering him to start from the bottom and take up the duty of serving the Tsaritsa.
His insatiable desire for conquest would thus be constantly satiated in fighting for the Fatui, and his ever-burgeoning ego would gorge upon the elation of vanquishing mighty foes...
Until at last, Ajax was chosen to be one of the Fatui Harbingers, donning the mantle of "Childe" Tartaglia and becoming one of the most powerful people in Snezhnaya.
But becoming Tartaglia was far from his end goal. To someone who sought to conquer the world, this was but a tiny step in his journey.
list.title: Character Story 5

list.desc:
"Dearest Sister, are you all keeping well at home? Has the old man's headache gotten any better?
Please send my regards to our parents and our siblings.
I've sent some wind chill medication over from Liyue Harbor. It's very effective, and will probably keep him from nagging for a while. It should reach you after a few days.
Apart from our father's affairs, I naturally haven't forgotten about gifts for you all.
This letter should come with two kites from Liyue, a rattle drum, two porcelain dolls from Inazuma, and a crate full of various snacks.
And please break it to Anthon that the residents of Liyue are just boring old ordinary humans, like us.
They're not made of stone, and they don't even eat stones.
Do not fret for my sake, Tonia, and refrain from making trouble for anyone at home. I will be home soon. When I have seized the seven stars of Liyue and laid them at the feet of Her Majesty the Tsaritsa, I will take the first ship home, just as I promised — and you know how I always keep my promises.
Yours faithfully, Your loyal knight."
list.title: Tartaglia's Letters to Home

list.desc:
Tartaglia's Delusion is his old badge of honor and the proof of his strength.
He still remembers with perfect clarity the day when he received his Delusion and ascended to become a member of the Harbingers.
As he stood before the cold, stern Tsaritsa, The Jester, the very first of the Fatui, personally pinned this insignia onto him.
It was his reward for slaying many terrible beasts, and a memento of countless battles.
But it was not this that brought Tartaglia joy, for honor is the natural reward of the warrior.
Nor did he pay any mind to the odd looks his new "colleagues" gave him, for the opinions and bellyaches of others meant nothing to him.
The sight of the Tsaritsa on her lofty throne alone stirred the young man's heart with respect and admiration, not merely because she opened the way for him to find an abundance of looming battles, but also because of the way she looked upon him.
Her gaze was cold but pure, arrogant yet sharp.
She was not only the sacrosanct Cryo Archon but also a true warrior.
Thus did Childe, having received his Delusion, swear an oath of fealty to the one and only Tsaritsa of Snezhnaya.
list.title: Delusion

list.desc: I'm No. 11 of the Fatui Harbingers, codename Childe, but I also go by Tartaglia. And you... Hmm, you too like to cause quite the stir, don't you? Something tells me we're going to get along splendidly.
list.title: Hello

list.desc: You know, there are better ways to seek out our enemies than... well, standing here.
list.title: Chat: Idleness

list.desc: This place is pretty dead... By which I mean, there's nothing to kill.
list.title: Chat: Test of Skills

list.desc: I wonder what the rest of the Harbingers are up to? Plotting and scheming on an ever-grander scale, no doubt.
list.title: Chat: The Fatui

list.desc: Where I'm from, if we didn't keep moving, we'd freeze to death. Literally.
list.title: Chat: Snezhnaya

list.desc: Ah, perfect weather for fishing! The sound of the rain scares them away, but once it stops, they're yours for the taking.
list.title: After the Rain

list.desc: Haha, ahh... could it be snowing in Snezhnaya too?
list.title: When It Snows: Foreign Country

list.desc: The world looks glorious in the snow. Pure white, like the light of the moon. A perfect backdrop for bloodshed.
list.title: When It Snows: Snezhnaya

list.desc: The wind is picking up. There is conflict in the air.
list.title: When It's Windy

list.desc: Just look at that wind blow!
list.title: When the Wind Is Blowing: Foreign Country

list.desc: The wind permeates all, cleansing both mind and body. Excellent.
list.title: When the Wind Is Blowing: Snezhnaya

list.desc: Morning, comrade! You're raring to go today, I see.
list.title: Good Morning

list.desc: You look well. What's your secret? Care to exchange notes?
list.title: Good Afternoon

list.desc: Whew, dinner was quite the feast. A spot of exercise is in order.
list.title: Good Evening

list.desc: Today was great. See you tomorrow, comrade!
list.title: Good Night

list.desc: A warrior must always be ready to face any challenge with his blade. The outcome of the battle is irrelevant — what matters is that you learn from the experience.
list.title: About Tartaglia

list.desc: Ah, I'm sure the Harbingers must know of my dealings with you by now. Oh, I'd love to see the look on their faces... Hahaha...
list.title: About Us: Comrades

list.desc: I am the least adept with a bow. And that is precisely why I must master it.
list.title: About Us: Weapons

list.desc: You wield such powers without owning a Vision... I really am excited to see what you have in store for us... Let's see how far you can go. Just don't go dying on me before you lay it all on the line in our final battle! I won't allow it!
list.title: About Us: Survival

list.desc: Comrade, how would you like to join the Fatui? ...Actually, scrap that. With your capabilities, you and I could head-to-head with the Harbingers and win. Wouldn't want to miss an opportunity like that.
list.title: About Us: Invitation

list.desc: If it makes me stronger, I'll take it. Vision? Great. Delusion? Don't mind if I do. Heretical teachings from the Abyss? Sign me up.
list.title: About the Vision

list.desc: The skeletal-white snowscape devours life without leaving any trace. It is the invisible enemy we fight against each day.
list.title: Something to Share

list.desc: I once ventured deep into the abyss and came face-to-face with an enormous beast. I don't know its name, all I know is the sight of it chilled me to the bone. But mark my words, one day I will march back in there and behead that beast, and you, comrade, will be my witness!
list.title: Interesting Things

list.desc: It's been years since I last saw my master. I should hope that next we meet, I'll at least be able to force her to use both hands to beat me...
list.title: About Skirk

list.desc: There's far more to that man than meets the eye. As for the extent of his power... lots to look forward to, I think.
list.title: About Zhongli: Pondering

list.desc: Tell me, how has Mr. Zhongli been lately? Not bad, you say? Seems he's had no problem acclimating to "mortal" life. Hmph, he sure had me fooled. Such a fiasco mustn't be so easily forgiven! The only way to reconciliation is fierce combat! What do you mean I'm no match for him? Hahaha...
list.title: About Zhongli: Challenge

list.desc: Her Royal Highness the Tsaritsa is actually a gentle soul. Too gentle, in fact, and that's why she had to harden herself. Likewise, she declared war against the whole world only because she dreams of peace. And because she made an enemy of the world, I had the chance to become acquainted with you.
list.title: About Tsaritsa

list.desc: Varka? Just the thought of one day going head-to-head with him in combat, the fabled Knight of Boreas himself, titan of the Knights of Favonius... It makes me buzz with excitement. It's a beautiful life we live in this world.
list.title: About Varka

list.desc: Remember, comrade, one day I will conquer the world!
list.title: More About Tartaglia: I

list.desc: Face me in person, man to man, and I'll always have a chance of beating you. Same goes if you're a deity or a monster from the abyss. But the Harbingers? They are more enamored with their intangible methods, spending their days scheming and maneuvering. This is why we cannot get along.
list.title: More About Tartaglia: II

list.desc: However far away my motherland may be, we all live under the same sky. That snow-white moon... My family must be able to see it too. I hope my siblings are well... And I hope that they have turned out to be formidable warriors too.
list.title: More About Tartaglia: III

list.desc: Comrade, a word of advice: Don't go yelling stupid things in the heat of battle. They might sound good in your head, but if you think about it, they make no sense at all. I'm talking about things like, "I'm on fire!" That's the last thing we want. Fire leaves behind nothing but ashes. And you must survive at all costs.
list.title: More About Tartaglia: IV

list.desc: Ah, how time flies. One day, you will see how I conquer the world and crush the thrones of gods beneath my heel. In the meantime... no dying, comrade! Keep yourself alive! Hahaha.
list.title: More About Tartaglia: V

list.desc: Ice fishing and combat follow the same principle. Patience and decisiveness are key. Though having said that... I suppose the same is true of everything in life.
list.title: Tartaglia's Hobbies

list.desc: My pet peeves? Hmm, well, to be honest, I'm far too busy journeying with you and slaying powerful enemies to dwell on such trifling matters.
list.title: Tartaglia's Troubles

list.desc: There's plenty of delicious food to sink your teeth into in this world... and plenty of fights to sink your teeth into as well. Life is beautiful.
list.title: Favorite Food

list.desc: Food is like weaponry. A true warrior never deliberates unduly over their choice of weapon, nor do they do so over the food they eat. Neither should you.
list.title: Least Favorite Food

list.desc: Happy birthday, comrade! Anyone you need knocked off their perch today? Let me know. I'll happily oblige...
list.title: Birthday

list.desc: Hohoho, I feel like I've gotten stronger! Now, who shall I use as my guinea pig...
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Intro

list.desc: "A warrior's strength is like a dome. The bigger the dome, the more opponents he can challenge inside it." Hmm, who was it that said this again?
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Building Up

list.desc: Bravo, comrade! Thanks to your help, I am one step closer to my goal of conquering the world. I doubt even the Tsaritsa herself ever expected I would make it this far.
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Climax

list.desc: Comrade. Make sure you keep training too. Otherwise, who will be left to fight me to the death when the world lies defeated at my feet? Hahaha.
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Conclusion

list.desc: You're mine!
list.title: Elemental Skill: I

list.desc: Ha!
list.title: Elemental Skill: II

list.desc: Tidal wave!
list.title: Elemental Skill: III

list.desc: Bring it on!
list.title: Elemental Skill: IV

list.desc: Who's next?
list.title: Elemental Skill: V

list.desc: Hah...
list.title: Elemental Skill: VI

list.desc: Riptide!
list.title: Elemental Burst: I

list.desc: You can run, but you can't hide!
list.title: Elemental Burst: II

list.desc: Shouldn't let your guard down!
list.title: Elemental Burst: III

list.desc: Brace yourself, this is gonna hurt!
list.title: Elemental Burst: IV

list.desc: No time to lose.
list.title: Sprint Start: I

list.desc: I could get used to this.
list.title: Deploying Wind Glider: I

list.desc: Alright, now we're talkin'!
list.title: Opening Treasure Chest: I

list.desc: Not bad... Not bad at all!
list.title: Opening Treasure Chest: II

list.desc: Now I just need to get my hands on the rest!
list.title: Opening Treasure Chest: III

list.desc: Heh, this is getting interesting.
list.title: Low HP: I

list.desc: You're pretty good!
list.title: Low HP: II

list.desc: Death looms. My time to shine!
list.title: Low HP: III

list.desc: How... I had only just...
list.title: Fallen: I

list.desc: Drat!
list.title: Fallen: II

list.desc: I'm... quite impressed...
list.title: Fallen: III

list.desc: Amateur mistake.
list.title: Heavy Hit Taken: I

list.desc: Need to end a few enemies?
list.title: Joining Party: I

list.desc: Keep your eyes wide open!
list.title: Joining Party: II

list.desc: C'mon, don't keep me waiting!
list.title: Joining Party: III

list.desc: He was the first ever Fatui Harbinger, and today he is our leader. He only appears on important occasions. As for his accomplishments... To be honest, I don't really care. I owe my loyalty and devotion to the Tsaritsa, no one else.
list.title: About The Jester

list.desc: I've seen him in battle before, and oh what a sight it was. Perhaps I'm ranked too low for him to notice me right now. Well, he may not recognize my strengths yet, but one day, I'll show him what I'm made of.
list.title: About The Captain

list.desc: I heard that he took segments of himself at different ages, made prostheses out of them, and assigned different tasks to each one. I know... all my comrades are a little weird. Well, come to think of it, if I met another version of myself... Hah, we'd have to fight then and there to decide which one of us gets to survive.
list.title: About The Doctor

list.desc: The Fatui Harbingers are ranked by strength, and I have no idea why that girl is No. 3. I'd test my skills with every Harbinger who ranks above me if I had the chance, but when it comes to her... something just doesn't feel right. Anyway, you should be careful around her.
list.title: About Damselette

list.desc: Look, I've got nothing against people who have their own agendas - I myself joined the Fatui to get more experience in combat. But I don't like her at all. If she stood to benefit from betraying others, she'd turn against the Tsaritsa in a heartbeat. There isn't a sane bone in her body.
list.title: About The Knave

list.desc: I don't know what his motivations could be, but he seems genuine about wanting to help me. He treats me just like family. Oh, and speaking of family - Tonia and Teucer are always telling me about the pastries and other gifts he brings them when they write. So while I've been away form Snezhnaya, he's kept his promise to take care of my family.
list.title: About The Rooster

list.desc: She always seems engrossed in her research. Hmm... I wonder if those machines have anything to do with her? Anyway, I've only met her a few times, but every time she looked like she wanted to murder me. I have no idea what I possibly could have done to annoy her, though.
list.title: About Marionette

list.desc: Oh, now that guy has a head full of grandiose plans fueled by raw ambition. I don't understand a word he says once he starts talking about his theories... Eh, but as long as he keeps our cash reserves stocked up, I'm not complaining.
list.title: About Regrator

list.desc: I never got along with her, you know that. I guess there's not much more worth saying about her at this point. When you're a harbinger, you have to accept that death could come at any time... But don't worry about me. No matter what happens, I'll do whatever it takes to keep myself alive.
list.title: About The Fair Lady

list.desc: After he took the Gnosis, we lost all contact with him. Now comes the task of trying to hunt it down and get it back... I actually don't mind it - it means I get to travel all over. Wonder if I'll run into you somewhere along the way?
list.title: About The Balladeer

list.desc: Eating delicious food really has a way of taking all your cares away. Now, how should I repay you?
list.title: Receiving a Gift: I

list.desc: Your cooking skills seems to have improved quite a lot. Does that mean you're getting stronger all the time, too?
list.title: Receiving a Gift: II

list.desc: Um, I'll admit the taste surprises me a little. Hmm? Okay... I'll try one more bite.
list.title: Receiving a Gift: III

list.desc: What's the matter, out of practice?
list.title: Ally at Low HP: I

list.desc: Step aside, it's my turn!
list.title: Ally at Low HP: II

list.desc:
Haha, what a great sparring session! I didn't expect your martial arts to have improved so much. I feel hungry after such a good fight. You?

If you don't have any other plans, how about coming to try my cooking today?

list.desc:
There you are, comrade. Faster than I expected!

I see you haven't been neglecting your practice... I can tell by the look in your eyes.

Here, take this. It's a Mr. Cyclops plushie from Teucer. He's looking forward to playing with you again someday.

It's colder in Snezhnaya than in Liyue, so remember to dress warmly then!

list.desc:
"Teucer mentioned you in his letter, Traveler."

"Receiving a letter from family and being in the company of my friends, what a great day!"

"Yes, yes, we got it, Tartaglia. Come and help us out here!"
